name: VanillaSkills
description: A server-side skill-tree and progression overhaul for vanilla clients. Adds a per-player skill tree with a chest-GUI editor, removes Mending, and introduces five tool/weapon/armor tiers (Hardwood, Rose Gold, Steel, Crystalline, Dragon) with set bonuses, an Ender Dragon material chain (scales to Dragon Ingot to Dragon gear), an Elytra-into-chestplate combine, stacking/longer potions, and craftable Fortune IV/V.
